title: Family Case Strategy Working Draft
summary: Source-status record for a family-created strategy document organizing anticipated defenses, family arguments, evidence needs, and unresolved theories.

document_structure.definition: Alternative explanations the family believed opposing parties might offer.
Advocacy positions and counterarguments proposed by the family.
Records, witnesses, professionals, and source material the draft identifies as necessary to test the theory.
Recommendations about what to emphasize, avoid, investigate, or obtain; these notes are not evidence.

direct_source_findings: The document repeatedly separates anticipated defenses from the family's arguments.
The document contains rhetorical questions, statements of personal opinion, suspected motives, and proposed legal theories.
The document acknowledges that substantial medical, police, EMS, funeral, probate, witness, and expert evidence would be needed.
The document includes internal recommendations about claims that may be weak, premature, or better omitted.
The document is not written as an official investigative report, expert report, court ruling, or final legal memorandum.

evidence_layer_rules.rule: Summarize from the original agency or court record and preserve its legal scope.
Attribute to the expert and identify scope, methods, opinion level, and limitations.
Identify the speaker and distinguish firsthand recollection from attributed or hearsay content.
Do not present as established without lawful investigation, qualified analysis, and relevant judicial findings.

scope_limitations: The presentation does not independently verify its allegations or authenticate its referenced records.
The presentation does not determine Gina Gazvoda's cause or manner of death.
The presentation does not establish criminal guilt, motive, negligence, or civil liability.
Statements concerning legal rights and duties require complete facts, current law, and qualified counsel.
The private working draft contains sensitive family, medical, legal, and third-party material and is not publicly hosted.

provenance.review_method: Direct text review of the archived DOCX strategy document
provenance.notes: The public page describes the document's structure and verification requirements without republishing inflammatory or private allegations.

page_citations: Gina Gazvoda Case Presentation working document, full text reviewed
redaction_notes: The public summary excludes addresses, personal contact details, signatures, medical detail, speculative accusations, private financial information, and unnecessary third-party identifiers.
publication_authority: Family-authorized source-status summary; not represented as evidence, a legal conclusion, or a court record.

revision_history.change_summary: Corrected the public presentation from a generic family case page to a source-reviewed strategy-working-draft status.
